docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACEVEDO, ROSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORALES, APOLO $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ACEVEDO, ROSA AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, APOLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 - SERVED FEB-02-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, APOLO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---JOSE MENDEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2014 - JUDGMENT.
